description: Dedicated repository for high-intensity seedContractCard entries and eventContract instances. Vault content repo for procedural horror seeds and encounter-level events.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All artifacts must include a valid schemaRef pointing to an approved schema.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: All artifacts must include target metadata for routing and registry binding.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: All authoring requests must reference the routing spine for route resolution.

authoringHints.summary: T2-vault content repo for seed and event contract instances. Schemas are defined in Horror.Place; instances live here.
aiBehavior: Always verify schemaRef before generating seed or event artifacts
Route seedContractCard and eventContract T2-vault requests to this repo
Ensure all seeds reference valid regionContractCard and personaContractCard dependencies
